title: TC4 ConfigRecipes wand/staff component recipe parity
parity_changes: Added TC4ConfigRecipesWandIndex for materialized original cap recipes.
Added materialized original greatwood wand rod recipe.
Added materialized original staff rod recipes using tc4_charm catalyst and base rod inputs.
Preserved original research keys CAP_*, ROD_* and STAVE_* for generated component recipes.
Preserved original craftCost based primal vis formulas for caps, rods and staff rods.
Integrated component recipes before generated ArcaneWandRecipe and ArcaneSceptreRecipe assembly recipes.
Marked prebuilt wand shortcuts as compatibility drift adapters rather than original recipes.
drift_found_and_fixed: Wand/staff component crafting previously depended mostly on generated assembly and prebuilt shortcuts; Stage190 adds original ConfigRecipes component chain.
Old prebuilt shortcuts remain explicitly documented as adapters, not original TC4 parity recipes.
adapter_notes: Forge 1.19.2 item IDs are tc4-prefixed materialized adapter items while research keys, costs and recipe structure follow original TC4.
Arcane Workbench server preview is the authoritative resolver for generated recipes.
